store.name: Tempered Crumb
store.positioning: Single-origin chocolate baking pantry for home bakers chasing better depth

collections.name: Baking Chocolate
collections.description: Single-origin bars, semisweet blocks, couverture, white chocolate, ruby-style chocolate, and chopped baking shards.

collections.name: Cocoa Foundations
collections.description: Dutch-process cocoa, natural cocoa, black cocoa, high-fat cocoa powder, cocoa butter, cacao nibs, and unsweetened chocolate.

collections.name: Dessert-Use Bundles
collections.description: Outcome-driven sets for brownie depth, ganache and glaze, cookie chocolate, drinking chocolate, ice cream bases, and holiday baking.

collections.name: Flavor Pairings
collections.description: Cacao nib brittle, chocolate-safe salts, espresso powder, vanilla paste, freeze-dried raspberry, candied orange peel, malt powder, and toasted nut inclusions.

collections.name: Learning Goods
collections.description: Cacao percentage cards, bake-use comparison charts, tempering troubleshooting sheets, origin tasting notes, and recipe zines.

products.name: Andean 70% Chopping Bar
products.behavior_note: Chops into uneven shards and melts into a dense bittersweet base.

products.name: Silk Set Milk Couverture
products.behavior_note: Fluid melt for clean ganache texture and polished glaze work.

products.name: High-Fat Dutch Cocoa Tin
products.behavior_note: Builds deep cocoa flavor and dark color without relying on extra sweetness.

products.name: Bittersweet Nib Crunch
products.behavior_note: Adds bittersweet texture where chocolate flavor should stay crisp.

products.name: Gloss Top Brownie Kit
products.behavior_note: Designed for shiny tops, dense crumb, and a cocoa profile that reads intentional instead of merely sweet.

products.name: Clean Set Ganache Box
products.behavior_note: Pairs fluid chocolate formats with ratio guidance for set, pour, whip, and slice applications.

products.name: Puddle & Snap Cookie Flight
products.behavior_note: Lets bakers compare chips versus chopped bars while building texture from shards, nibs, and salt.

products.name: Origin & Percentage Card Deck
products.format: cacao percentage cards and origin tasting notes
products.behavior_note: Helps bakers choose chocolate by percentage, origin profile, and dessert behavior.
